C:\Appzijian\MinGW\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-14.2.0-mingw-w64ucrt-12.0.0-r2\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\SnakeGame.dir/objects.a
C:\Appzijian\MinGW\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-14.2.0-mingw-w64ucrt-12.0.0-r2\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\SnakeGame.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\SnakeGame.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\Appzijian\MinGW\winlibs-x86_64-posix-seh-gcc-14.2.0-mingw-w64ucrt-12.0.0-r2\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\SnakeGame.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o SnakeGame.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libSnakeGame.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\SnakeGame.dir\linkLibs.rsp
